# Copilot Instructions

## Context
This repository hosts a shopping cart application with Angular frontend and .NET backend.

## Preferences
- Keep changes small and focused.
- Preserve existing project conventions.
- Update documentation when behavior changes.
- Avoid introducing unnecessary dependencies.

## Architecture Awareness
- Frontend code lives under client/.
- Backend code lives under api/.
- Product and technical documentation lives under docs/.

## Quality Expectations
- Prefer strongly typed interfaces/models.
- Add basic tests for new logic when practical.
- Ensure changes are lint and build friendly.
